news.t: Leverage Shares by Themes continues product expansion with a new single stock leveraged ETF, bringing investors an exciting opportunity to amplify exposure to Boeing (BA)

overview.description: The Leverage Shares 2X Long BA Daily ETF (BOEG) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in industrials equity. The fund aims to provide 2x leveraged exposure to the daily price movement of Boeing Company (NYSE: BA) stock, less fees, and expenses. BOEG was launched on Jun 13, 2025 and is issued by Leverage Shares.

data.title: Leverage Shares by Themes continues product expansion with a new single stock leveraged ETF, bringing investors an exciting opportunity to amplify exposure to Boeing (BA)
data.text: GREENWICH, Conn., June 13, 2025 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Leverage Shares by Themes, an issuer of innovative exchange-traded products, is excited to announce the launch of the Leverage Shares 2X long BA Dai...
